squeezr.description: AI context compressor for token savings (real-time stats and status)

serena.description: Semantic code analysis and search (symbols, references, definitions)

context7.description: Up-to-date library documentation search (Lit, Web Awesome, @lit/localize, etc.)

playwright.description: Browser automation via Playwright: navigate, click, type, snapshot, E2E test execution

chrome-devtools.description: Chrome DevTools bridge: inspect DOM/CSS, execute JS, record performance traces on live browser
